OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianCreationIP

omniProcessElements.name: ReturnClinicianRecord
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "CreateClinicianRecord:result", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CreateClinicianRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "Suffix" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:Suffix%", "Email" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:Email%", "LeadSource" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:LeadSource%", "FirstName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:FirstNameN%", "Comments" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:Comments%", "GeographicPreference" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:GeographicPreference%", "LastName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:LastNameN%", "Mobile" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:Mobile%", "Salutation" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:Salutation%", "ProfessionalTitle" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:ProfessionalTitle%", "MiddleName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:MiddleName%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "remoteClass" : "GuidedClinicianCreationController", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "createClinician", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordId" : "=%CreateClinicianRecord:result:clinicianId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadBoardCertificationDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:BoardCertified% == \"Yes\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "clinicianId" : "=%GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%", "status" : "Certified" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadBoardCertificationDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadHealthCareTaxonomyDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation%<> $Vlocity.NULL && %ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:Taxonomy-Block% <> $Vlocity.NULL", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "TaxonomyId" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:Taxonomy-Block:RecordId%", "TaxonomyName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:Taxonomy-Block:Name%", "PractitionerId" : "=%GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadHealthCareTaxonomyDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadMedicalLicenseDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:MedicalLicense% <> $Vlocity.NULL", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "medicalLicenseList" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:medicalLicenseList%", "clinicianId" : "=%GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%", "LastName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:ClinicianInformation:LastNameN%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadMedicalLicenseDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadPracticingSpecialtyDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation% && %ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PracticingSpecialty-Block% <> $Vlocity.NULL", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "SpecialtyName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PracticingSpecialty-Block:Name%", "SpecialtyId" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PracticingSpecialty-Block:RecordId%", "SubSpecialty" : "=\"$Vlocity.TRUE\"", "PractitionerId" : "=%GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadHealthCareSpecialtyDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadPrimarySpecialtyDM
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation% && %ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PrimarySpecialty-Block% <> $Vlocity.NULL", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "SpecialtyName" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PrimarySpecialty-Block:Name%", "SpecialtyId" : "=%ClinicianDetails:AdditionalInformation:PrimarySpecialty-Block:RecordId%", "PrimaryBoardSpecialty" : "=\"$Vlocity.TRUE\"", "PractitionerId" : "=%GETClinicianWithRelatedDetailsDM:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadHealthCareSpecialtyDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
